signals.headline: Institutional ETF Inflows Resume After Weakness | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Institutional ETF Inflows Resume After Weakness | YES | HIGH confidence**

Five consecutive weeks of positive **spot ETF inflows** have been recorded since mid-February[3], with derivatives positioning reaching its most bullish level in over a month[3]. This marks a reversal from the earlier bearish pressure that characterized March 2026.

signals.headline: DoubleZero Launches Real-Time Solana Blockchain Data Feed | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
DoubleZero Launches Real-Time Solana Blockchain Data Feed | YES | MED confidence**

DoubleZero Edge was deployed this week, providing traders with real-time raw data directly from the Solana blockchain[3]. This infrastructure development supports institutional participation and faster information access.
